model.notes: Google DeepMind MoE (A4B). 256K native context. Apache 2.0. Multimodal (text+image). Thinking mode built in. Fits on single RTX 5060 Ti 16GB (IQ4_XS + 65K ctx). Benchmarked 2026-04-03 via llama.cpp b8642, 1x GPU.
